channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Nigeria Earns Three Relay Spots at 2026 World Relays in Gaborone
item.description: Team Nigeria wrapped up their campaign at the 2026 World Relays in Gaborone with an impressive performance, securing three spots for major global competitions. They kicked off their efforts with a mix...

item.title: NHS to roll out rapid one-minute jab immunotherapy for multiple cancers to shorten treatment times
item.description: The NHS is introducing a rapid immunotherapy jab, pembrolizumab, that targets cancer by activating the body's immune response. Administered as a one-minute subcutaneous injection, it replaces longer i...

item.title: EU Maintains Funding for Tanzania’s Green and Smart Cities Programme Despite Challenges
item.description: The European Union has confirmed that it will continue supporting Tanzania’s Green and Smart Cities (SASA) programme, a four-year initiative valued at €92.7 million (about 265 billion Tanzanian shilli...

item.title: Nigerians Seek Evacuation from South Africa Amid Rising Xenophobic Attacks
item.description: The Nigerian Ministry of Foreign Affairs don announce say 130 Nigerians don register for voluntary evacuation from South Africa due to the ongoing attacks wey dey target foreign nationals. This attack...

item.title: Wall Street Journal Highlights Risks of Subsidized AI Revenue and Investor Transparency
item.description: A Wall Street Journal opinion piece raises concerns about the reliability of reported AI company revenues. Some AI firms are reportedly paying partners or subsidizing clients to use their products, wh...

item.title: Early Trends Show NDA Leading in Puducherry Assembly Elections 2026
item.description: The counting of votes for the 2026 Puducherry Assembly elections commenced on Monday from 8 am. By 10:35 am, early trends from the Election Commission indicated that the National Democratic Alliance (...

item.title: Health Minister Calls for Return of State-Sponsored Doctors to Reduce Maternal and Infant Mortality
item.description: The Tanzania Health Minister, Mohamed Mchengerwa, has instructed that all doctors and health workers trained at government expense must return to public service, amid rising concern over high maternal...

item.title: Counting of votes begins for 2026 West Bengal Assembly elections amid mixed exit poll predictions
item.description: The counting of votes for the 2026 West Bengal Assembly elections commenced on Monday morning at 8 am, following polling held in two phases on April 23 and April 29. The election witnessed a record pr...

item.title: TDK Ventures’ Nicolas Sauvage focuses on AI infrastructure, robotics, and future bottlenecks
item.description: Nicolas Sauvage, founder of TDK Ventures, is building an investment strategy around what he calls the less glamorous but critical layers of artificial intelligence. Speaking at a StrictlyVC event, Sau...

item.title: Canadian M&A Focuses on Strategic Deals and Value over Volume
item.description: In 2025, the Canadian mergers and acquisitions (M&A) market has shifted dramatically, prioritizing strategic precision over sheer deal volume. Although the total number of transactions fell to its low...

item.title: Gujarat Board Announces HSC Class 12 Results for Science and General Streams Today
item.description: The Gujarat Secondary and Higher Secondary Education Board (GSEB) is all set to declare the HSC or Class 12 results for both Science and General streams on May 4, 2026, at 10 am. Students who appeared...

item.title: Tanzanian banks report rising profits despite high lending costs and fees
item.description: Tanzania's commercial banks posted strong profits in the first quarter of 2026, with total net earnings of Sh658.2 billion, up 10.12 percent from the previous quarter. The main driver was interest inc...

item.title: Two-bedroom Rose Bay apartment sells for $1.3 million despite limited amenities
item.description: A 90-square-metre, two-bedroom apartment at 4/1A Caledonian Road, Rose Bay, NSW, recently sold at auction for $1.3 million. Despite lacking a dedicated parking space and natural light, the property at...

item.title: CRDB Insurance reports strong growth with Sh4.4 billion profit and proposes Sh1.5 billion dividend
item.description: The board of CRDB Insurance Company has proposed a dividend payout of Sh1.5 billion, which is Sh439 per share, for the financial year ending December 31, 2025. This proposal will need approval from th...

item.title: West Bengal Assembly Elections 2026: Mamata Banerjee Leading in Bhabanipur Amidst Close Contest in Nandigram
item.description: In the 2026 West Bengal Assembly elections, the counting of votes saw Chief Minister Mamata Banerjee leading against Bharatiya Janata Party’s Suvendu Adhikari in the Bhabanipur constituency. By 1.10 p...

item.title: Vote Counting Underway for Umreth Assembly Bypoll in Gujarat
item.description: The vote counting for the Umreth Assembly by-election in Gujarat commenced on Monday, May 4, 2026, under strict security arrangements. The bypoll was conducted on April 23 following the unfortunate de...

item.title: Capital1's Gaston and Doromal to Compete Again in BVR Sipalay Open
item.description: The BVR Sipalay Open is set to welcome back notable beach volleyball players Pauline Gaston and Roma Doromal from Capital1, marking their return to the Beach Volleyball Republic (BVR) tournament scene...

item.title: Sule Lamido Calls For Unity Within PDP and Invites Former Leaders Back
item.description: Former Jigawa State Governor, Sule Lamido, don talk say members of the Peoples Democratic Party (PDP) suppose put aside their wahala and focus on unity. According to am, if dem no reconcile, e fit dam...

item.title: Economic and Investment Outlook: Q1 2026 Impact of Geopolitical Tensions and Energy Shocks
item.description: The first quarter of 2026 began on a positive note for both the global and South African economies, but optimism was quickly shaken by geopolitical events. In late February, US and Israeli strikes on ...

item.title: Kenwyn Islamic Society Calls for Resignation of Mosque Trustees Following Controversy
item.description: The Kenwyn community in Cape Town is expressing widespread concern after a week of controversy surrounding the Waterloo Road Mosque. The Kenwyn Islamic Society (KIS) has formally requested the resigna...
